title: 皐月賞の後に・ご令嬢の一冠

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! That's one crown down! An honor fit for
yours truly!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: That was amazing! You were so fast out there!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
It makes sense, considering whose daughter she
is. I'm looking forward to the next race!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, everyone! I'm more than just my
mother's daughter!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I have a name, and it's King Halo! Drill that into
your heads before you leave this arena!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Show some manners when speaking to a first-rate
Umamusume! Ohohoho!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... I can't keep on like this! During the Derby, I must...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... So, it looks like little Miss Royalty won
after all.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But this isn't the end, because that would be too
boring.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: If I keep this up, then success is certain!
choice_data_list: You'll seize victory at the Japanese Derby!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
There is a once-in-a-lifetime race that all runners
dream of when they take part in the Twinkle
Series...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Will I not squander this one chance and leave my
mark? My reputation as an Umamusume depends
on it.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I just have to win the Derby. I must win!
